title: New GP Surgery for Cheltenham - Max Wilkinson MP
headings: h2: Cheltenham Needs A New GP Surgery
h3: Back Max's campaign for the local healthcare we deserve
text_excerpt: New GP Surgery for Cheltenham - Max Wilkinson MP Skip to main content Max Wilkinson MP Contact Max Meet Max Wilkinson Max's Campaigns News Donate Join Donate Join Max's Campaigns Film-style age limits for social media Max on Race Week Max on the Environment Max on the Economy Max on the NHS New GP Surgery for Cheltenham Back Jools' Law Reopen The Aveta Birth Centre Don't Let Cheltenham Lose Its Voice Save Our Recycling Centre 2025 Back Max's Sunshine Bill Scrap Labour's Winter Fuel Cuts Fix Our High Street News 2026 2025 2024 Cheltenham Needs A New GP Surgery Back Max's campaign for the local healthcare we deserve Cheltenham’s Conservative MP previously announced plans to bring back 24/7 doctor-led A&E at Cheltenham General and improve GP services. As I speak to residents across Cheltenham, facing ever-longer waits for appointments and basic services, they're asking me what went wrong. Demand for appointments is increasing because of failures elsewhere in the healthcare system. Local surgeries have warned that GPs are working long hours without breaks. That's why I'm launching this campaign: local people deserve better than these Tory failures on the health service. I'm in discussions with our local health service and have called on local councils to put this project on their infrastructure funding list. Will you sign my petition to help show local health bosses that Cheltenham needs a new GP surgery? Back Max's Campaign for a new GP surgery A new GP surgery is needed in Cheltenham to help people get quicker appointments to see their doctor.
